creator: thierry@thomas.as
text:
Le 20 Nov 01 à 22:40:04 +0000, Thierry Thomas écrivait :
> The following reply was made to PR ports/32090; it has been noted by GNATS.
> 
> From: Thierry Thomas <thierry@thomas.as>
> To: FreeBSD-gnats-submit@FreeBSD.ORG
> Cc:  
> Subject: Re: ports/32090: New port mail/imp-devel: version 3.0 of the webmail IMP
> Date: Wed, 21 Nov 2001 07:36:24 +0100
> 
>  Le 18 Nov 01 à 23:01:01 +0000, Thierry Thomas écrivait :
>  > 
>  > >Number:         32090
>  > >Category:       ports
>  > >Synopsis:       New port mail/imp-devel: version 3.0 of the webmail IMP

I do not know why, but this PR has forked into PR ports/32153.
PR ports/32090 should be closed, and superseded by PR ports/32153.
-- 
Th. Thomas.
